sentences.en: The lookalike audience performed 3 times better than the broad targeting group.
sentences.zh: 相似受众的表现是宽泛定向组的3倍。

sentences.en: We are testing deep links that take users directly to the relevant content in the app.
sentences.zh: 我们正在测试深度链接，直接把用户带到应用内的相关内容。

sentences.en: The customer lifetime value for premium subscribers is four times that of free users.
sentences.zh: 付费订阅用户的客户终身价值是免费用户的四倍。

sentences.en: Our top-of-funnel awareness campaign generated 50,000 impressions yesterday.
sentences.zh: 我们的漏斗顶部品牌认知活动昨天产生了5万次曝光。

sentences.en: The upsell prompt at the end of onboarding converted at 12%.
sentences.zh: 新手引导结束时的升级提示转化率为12%。

example.en: Lookalike audiences are built from your best existing customers' profiles.
example.zh: 相似受众是基于你最优质的现有客户画像构建的。

example.en: Deep links improve conversion by skipping the homepage and going straight to the offer.
example.zh: 深度链接跳过首页直达优惠页面，从而提升转化率。

example.en: Maximizing lifetime value is more profitable than constantly acquiring new users.
example.zh: 最大化终身价值比不断获取新用户更有利可图。

example.en: The banner ad received 200,000 impressions but only 500 clicks.
example.zh: 横幅广告获得了20万次曝光，但只有500次点击。

example.en: The upsell strategy increased average order value by 35%.
example.zh: 升级销售策略将平均订单价值提高了35%。

sentences.en: The A/B test showed a statistically significant improvement in the treatment group.
sentences.zh: A/B测试显示实验组有统计学上显著的改善。

sentences.en: We should build a modular architecture so features can be released independently.
sentences.zh: 我们应该构建模块化架构，让功能可以独立发布。

sentences.en: The watchlist feature has the highest stickiness among all product features.
sentences.zh: 自选股功能在所有产品功能中粘性最高。

sentences.en: We need to define the minimum viable product before committing engineering resources.
sentences.zh: 在投入工程资源之前，我们需要先定义最小可行产品。

sentences.en: The real-time notification system reduced the average response time by 60%.
sentences.zh: 实时通知系统将平均响应时间减少了60%。

example.en: We need at least 10,000 samples to achieve statistically significant results.
example.zh: 我们需要至少1万个样本才能获得统计显著的结果。

example.en: A modular codebase makes it easier to maintain and scale the product.
example.zh: 模块化的代码库使产品更容易维护和扩展。

example.en: High stickiness means users keep coming back to the product habitually.
example.zh: 高粘性意味着用户习惯性地反复使用产品。

example.en: Ship the MVP first and iterate based on real user feedback.
example.zh: 先发布最小可行产品，再基于真实用户反馈迭代。

example.en: Real-time market data is essential for active traders.
example.zh: 实时行情数据对活跃交易者至关重要。

sentences.en: The earnings per share exceeded expectations by 12 cents, sending the stock up 6%.
sentences.zh: 每股收益超出预期12美分，推动股价上涨6%。

sentences.en: The central bank's quantitative easing policy has inflated asset prices across the board.
sentences.zh: 央行的量化宽松政策全面推高了资产价格。

sentences.en: We see value in defensive sectors like utilities and healthcare during this downturn.
sentences.zh: 在此次下行中，我们看好公用事业和医疗等防御性板块的价值。

sentences.en: The trailing twelve-month revenue reached $500 million for the first time.
sentences.zh: 过去十二个月的营收首次达到5亿美元。

sentences.en: Insider buying is often interpreted as a bullish signal by the market.
sentences.zh: 内部人买入通常被市场解读为看多信号。

example.en: Diluted earnings per share is a more conservative measure than basic EPS.
example.zh: 稀释每股收益是比基本EPS更保守的指标。

example.en: Quantitative easing increases money supply by purchasing government bonds.
example.zh: 量化宽松通过购买国债来增加货币供应。

example.en: Defensive sectors tend to outperform during economic recessions.
example.zh: 防御性板块往往在经济衰退期间表现较好。

example.en: The trailing twelve-month P/E ratio removes seasonal distortions.
example.zh: 过去十二个月的市盈率消除了季节性失真。

example.en: A cluster of insider buying often precedes positive news announcements.
example.zh: 密集的内部人买入往往先于利好消息公布。

sentences.en: The one-on-one meeting should focus on the employee's growth, not just status updates.
sentences.zh: 一对一面谈应该聚焦员工的成长，而不只是状态更新。

sentences.en: We introduced a RACI matrix to clarify roles and responsibilities for the project.
sentences.zh: 我们引入了RACI矩阵来明确项目的角色和职责。

sentences.en: The onsite offsite helped the remote team build stronger personal connections.
sentences.zh: 线下团建帮助远程团队建立了更强的个人联系。

sentences.en: Please draft a headcount proposal for the Q3 hiring plan.
sentences.zh: 请为Q3招聘计划起草一份人员编制提案。

sentences.en: High performers should be given stretch assignments to accelerate their development.
sentences.zh: 应该给高绩效员工挑战性任务来加速他们的成长。

example.en: Effective one-on-ones build trust between managers and direct reports.
example.zh: 有效的一对一面谈能建立管理者和直接下属之间的信任。

vocabulary.meaning: RACI矩阵（负责/批准/咨询/知情）

example.en: The RACI matrix prevents confusion about who makes the final decision.
example.zh: RACI矩阵防止了关于谁做最终决策的混乱。

example.en: The budget only allows for three additional headcount this quarter.
example.zh: 预算本季度只允许增加三个编制。

example.en: A stretch assignment pushes employees beyond their comfort zone.
example.zh: 挑战性任务推动员工走出舒适区。

example.en: The annual offsite is the best time to discuss long-term strategy.
example.zh: 年度团建是讨论长期战略的最佳时机。

sentences.en: The winner-take-all dynamics in this market make speed of execution critical.
sentences.zh: 这个市场赢家通吃的特性使得执行速度至关重要。

sentences.en: We are pursuing a razor-and-blade model where the app is free but premium data is paid.
sentences.zh: 我们采用剃刀与刀片模式，应用免费但高级数据付费。

sentences.en: The switching cost for existing users creates a natural barrier to entry for competitors.
sentences.zh: 现有用户的转换成本为竞争对手创造了天然的进入壁垒。

sentences.en: Our three-year vision is to become the default investment platform for young professionals.
sentences.zh: 我们的三年愿景是成为年轻专业人士的默认投资平台。

sentences.en: The macro environment favors companies with strong cash reserves and low debt.
sentences.zh: 宏观环境有利于现金储备充足且负债率低的公司。

example.en: Social media platforms often exhibit winner-take-all market dynamics.
example.zh: 社交媒体平台经常表现出赢家通吃的市场特性。

example.en: High switching costs lock in customers and improve retention.
example.zh: 高转换成本锁定客户并提升留存率。

example.en: Licensing requirements create a high barrier to entry in financial services.
example.zh: 牌照要求在金融服务领域创造了很高的进入壁垒。

example.en: The macro environment influences investment decisions more than company fundamentals.
example.zh: 宏观环境对投资决策的影响大于公司基本面。

example.en: The razor-and-blade model generates recurring revenue from consumable add-ons.
example.zh: 剃刀与刀片模式通过消耗性附加产品产生经常性收入。
